additional_metadata.note: First Abuja dbt Meetup, hosted online.

events.agenda: Inaugural Abuja dbt Meetup covering workflow streamlining, dbt incremental models, and the state of analytics engineering.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow, focusing on the impact of dbt in the data community and professional development for analytics engineers.
events.raw_text:
Sat, Apr 27, 2024 · 1:00 PM to 2:30 PM CEST

Online event

Abuja dbt Meetup Online

Hosted by FABIYI O. and 2 others

Details

✨We're excited to host our first Abuja dbt Meetup!✨

✨ What to expect at this meetup ✨
📍 Aminat Lawal will be speaking on "From Siloed Scripts to Streamlined Workflows".
📍 Adedamola Onabanjo will be speaking on "Capabilities and Benefits of dbt Incremental Models".
📍 David Effiong will be speaking on "The State of Analytics Engineering".

Video call link: https://meet.google.com/wpe-muqn-ghr

dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow. Events will focus on the impact of dbt (data build tool) in the data community and professional development tools for analytics engineers.

talks.description: Discussion of moving from disconnected, siloed scripts to a streamlined, maintainable analytics workflow.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Aminat Lawal will be speaking on "From Siloed Scripts to Streamlined Workflows"
talks.title: From Siloed Scripts to Streamlined Workflows

talks.description: Overview of dbt's incremental models feature, its capabilities, and the benefits for managing large or frequently updated datasets.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Adedamola Onabanjo will be speaking on "Capabilities and Benefits of dbt Incremental Models"
talks.title: Capabilities and Benefits of dbt Incremental Models

talks.description: A broader look at the current state and direction of the analytics engineering discipline.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: David Effiong will be speaking on "The State of Analytics Engineering"
talks.title: The State of Analytics Engineering

events.agenda: Second Virtual Abuja dbt Meetup covering dbt fundamentals, scaling data modeling for Redshift, and building a data-driven culture through mentorship.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader data stack, operations, modeling, and testing topics.
events.raw_text:
Sat, Apr 26, 2025 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM CEST

Online event

Abuja dbt Meetup #2 (Virtual)

Hosted by Oluwatooni A. and dbt L.

Details

We're excited to host our second Virtual Abuja dbt Meetup, organized by the Young Data Professionals Community.

Talk 1 - "Getting started with dbt" by Adegbite Ayoade, Data Analytics Mentor at CareerFoundry

Talk 2 - "Mastering high scaling data modelling for Redshift using dbt" by Adelaine Gelain, Analytics Engineer at Tractive

Talk 3 - "From Insight to Impact: Creating a Sustainable Data-Driven Culture through Mentorship and Forward Thinking" by Ademide Adewale, Business Analyst at Pandagric Novum Limited.

talks.description: An introductory talk covering the fundamentals of getting started with dbt for newcomers to analytics engineering.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Talk 1 - "Getting started with dbt" by Adegbite Ayoade, Data Analytics Mentor at CareerFoundry
talks.title: Getting started with dbt

talks.description: Techniques for scaling data modeling on Redshift using dbt for high-volume workloads.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Talk 2 - "Mastering high scaling data modelling for Redshift using dbt" by Adelaine Gelain, Analytics Engineer at Tractive
talks.title: Mastering high scaling data modelling for Redshift using dbt

talks.description: Discussion of building a sustainable, data-driven organizational culture through mentorship and forward-thinking leadership.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Talk 3 - "From Insight to Impact: Creating a Sustainable Data-Driven Culture through Mentorship and Forward Thinking" by Ademide Adewale, Business Analyst at Pandagric Novum Limited
talks.title: From Insight to Impact: Creating a Sustainable Data-Driven Culture through Mentorship and Forward Thinking

additional_metadata.note: Third Virtual Abuja dbt Meetup; event was canceled before it took place, so no talk details are available.

events.agenda: Third Virtual Abuja dbt Meetup, organized by the Young Data Professionals Community; canceled before it occurred.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, focusing on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader data stack, operations, modeling, and testing topics.
events.raw_text:
This event was canceled

Sat, Aug 2, 2025 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM CEST

Online event

Abuja dbt Meetup #3 (Virtual)

Hosted by Oluwatooni A. and dbt L.

Details

We're excited to host our third Virtual Abuja dbt Meetup, organized by the Young Data Professionals Community.

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, expect big-picture conversations related to the data stacks, data operations, data teams, modeling, testing, dashboards, etc.

anomalies.issue: Event was canceled; has 0 talks (no agenda details published before cancellation)
